Bruteforce Instagram account’s passwords (lack of rate limiting protection).

This bug could allowed and attacker to bruteforce any Instagram account password without limiting his attempts. This issue occurs because no Rate Limit Protection is implemented. I was able to make...

Jan 22, 2019

Reveal if a Facebook merchant page has pending or completed orders.

This bug could be used by a malicious user to determine if a certain Facebook merchant page has pending or completed orders at the current time. Only admins of the page should know this because it ...

Jan 22, 2019

Generate Access Tokens for any Facebook user

This bug could allowed a malicious user to generate access tokens for any Facebook user. I found this bug by mistake when I was testing some Facebook endpoints used in the Rights Manger dashboard w...

Jan 22, 2019

Modify users profiles of techprep.fb.com

This bug reported to Facebook could allowed an attacker to read the list of all Facebook users who signed up in https://techprep.fb.com/ then he could modify the content of any profile linked to th...

Jan 22, 2019

Uploading files to api.techprep.fb.com

This bug found in one of Facebook domains (api.techprep.fb.com) could allowed an attacker to upload files to the server. All filetypes were supported that could lead to XSS. Reproduction Instructi...
